channel.title: tech on Chris Colvin </> Developer & Photographer
channel.description: Recent content in tech on Chris Colvin </> Developer & Photographer

item.title: It’s Not (Just) About Screen Time
item.description: Like a lot of people nowadays, I’ve been thinking a lot about how technology is impacting my mental and physical health.

item.title: In the Age of AI, Maybe Don’t Proofread?
item.description: Proofreading is one of the first things we learn to do in school after learning to write.

item.title: Why Micro Four Thirds
item.description: A Decision I have waffled on what my preferred camera is for many years now.

item.title: Where I'm Landing on AI
item.description: A House Finch taken with the Olympus E-M10 and 75-300mm II

item.title: A Normie's Guide to Online Privacy
item.description: If you’ve been on the internet much lately, you’ve probably noticed a growing distaste with big tech, corporate-run social media platforms, the huge amount of data they collect about you, and what they do with it.

item.title: The State of My Social Media in 2025
item.description: It’s 2025 and my social media presence has never been more fractured.

item.title: Baby's First Shell Script
item.description: Since I switch frequently between Linux, macOS, & Windows, one of the things that has become increasingly clear to me is that the Linux terminal is pretty awesome.
